message:
fix(security,perf): address critical vulnerabilities and optimize hot paths

Security fixes:
- extract.rs: Fix unquote_param panic on single-char input (bd-30c0)
- extract.rs: Add boundary length validation per RFC 2046 (bd-22da)
- extract.rs: Document serde_json recursion limit protection (bd-276d)

Performance optimizations:
- trie.rs: Rewrite is_uuid with zero-allocation byte validation (bd-21c2)
- response.rs: Use io::Write for hex formatting to avoid alloc (bd-25hi)

Clippy fixes:
- middleware.rs: Use Ipv4Addr::LOCALHOST constant
- validate.rs: Use RangeInclusive::contains for phone validation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
